channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pamela Evette and Alan Wilson advance to Republican runoff for South Carolina governor

item.title: The Little Sister, Festival-Circuit Ninja
item.description: Auto-fiction blends with social and spiritual realism.
